title: My Ice Cream Maker
description: Ice Cream Maker shop is now open to serve delicious ice cream cones and pair them with a frozen cupcake. Then serve this delicious icy dessert to your happy customers in this ice cream games. Ice Cream Maker - will unleash your creativity! If you know the answer to the question – How do you make ice cream? – this “addictive game” is the best option for you! or just dessert making games with levels, you choose! Are you ready for this breath of sweet and fresh air? Let’s have fun!
